collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (14 total Queries, 14 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT b.`brw_code`, b.`tool_name`, u.`full_name`, u.`user_code`, DATE_FORMAT(b.`borrowed_at`, '%b %d, %Y') AS borrowed_at, DATE_FORMAT(b.`due_date`, '%b %d, %Y') AS due_date, CASE b.`status` WHEN 1 THEN 'Active' WHEN 2 THEN 'Returned' WHEN 3 THEN 'Overdue' END AS status FROM `borrowings` b LEFT JOIN `users` u ON b.`user_code` = u.`user_code` ORDER BY b.`created_at` DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM `borrowings` b LEFT JOIN `users` u ON b.`user_code` = u.`user_code` WHERE 1=1 AND (b.`tool_name` LIKE '%tin%' OR u.`full_name` LIKE '%tin%' OR u.`user_code` LIKE '%tin%')

SELECT b.`brw_code`, b.`tool_name`, u.`full_name`, u.`user_code`, DATE_FORMAT(b.`borrowed_at`, '%b %d, %Y') AS borrowed_at, DATE_FORMAT(b.`due_date`, '%b %d, %Y') AS due_date, CASE b.`status` WHEN 1 THEN 'Active' WHEN 2 THEN 'Returned' WHEN 3 THEN 'Overdue' END AS status FROM `borrowings` b LEFT JOIN `users` u ON b.`user_code` = u.`user_code` WHERE 1=1 AND (b.`tool_name` LIKE '%tin%' OR u.`full_name` LIKE '%tin%' OR u.`user_code` LIKE '%tin%') ORDER BY b.`created_at` DESC LIMIT 8 OFFSET 0
